meta.title: GEONYX | Tender Text Generator
meta.description: Free tool for generating technical specifications for industrial floors. Fill in the parameters and get a ready-made tender text for GEONYX ARMOR, CHEM, THERM or HYDRO.

title: TENDER TEXT GENERATOR
subtitle: Fill in the facility parameters and get a ready-made technical text for tender documentation.

output.label: GENERATED TENDER TEXT
output.hint: Review and adapt the text as needed before including it in tender documentation.
output.line1: The floor coatings at {{facility}}, with a total area of {{area}} m², shall be executed as a monolithic mineral system type {{system}}.
output.line1WithProject: The floor coatings at the facility „{{name}}
output.lifespanLine: Service life of at least {{lifespan}} years under the planned loads
output.dust: Low dust emission and lasting mechanical resistance
output.repair: Possibility of local repairs without full shutdown of the facility
output.standard: Proven compliance with EN 13813 and applicable standards
output.warrantyLine: Warranty period for the completed coating: minimum {{warranty}} years.
output.reference: The contractor is required to submit a reference project with a minimum installed area of {{area}} m² when submitting the bid. The material system must be approved by the designer before commencement of works.
